title: ranunculus prasinus
intro: Ranunculus prasinus, also known as green buttercup or green crowfoot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus prasinus include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in oil to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
